# Command Examples

## Minimal Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1alpha1
id: example-command
kind: Command
spec:
    command:
        - example
```

## Curated Example

```yaml
kind: Command
spec:
  command: ["systemctl", "status", "containerd"]
  timeout: 30s
```
